laws.name: t_support_face_in_x12_base,_x13_x15_x17
laws.statement: if support_face in {x12_base, x13_x15_x17} then t = 25000

laws.name: t_support_bucket_in_x12_base,_x13_x15_x17
laws.statement: if support_bucket in {x12_base, x13_x15_x17} then t = 25000

laws.name: t_threshold_zone_in_boundary,_high,_low
laws.statement: if threshold_zone in {boundary, high, low} then t = 25000

laws.name: task_family_successful_solver_==_transform_solver
laws.statement: if successful_solver == transform_solver then task_family = object_move

laws.name: task_family_successful_solver_==_palette_solver
laws.statement: if successful_solver == palette_solver then task_family = recolor

laws.name: task_family_successful_solver_==_component_solver
laws.statement: if successful_solver == component_solver then task_family = topology_count

laws.name: task_family_successful_solver_==_mirror_solver
laws.statement: if successful_solver == mirror_solver then task_family = symmetry_fill

laws.name: successful_solver_task_family_==_topology_count
laws.statement: if task_family == topology_count then successful_solver = component_solver

laws.name: successful_solver_task_family_==_symmetry_fill
laws.statement: if task_family == symmetry_fill then successful_solver = mirror_solver

laws.name: successful_solver_task_family_==_object_move
laws.statement: if task_family == object_move then successful_solver = transform_solver
